但係我買ryzen master, bios都寫1.6幾

我都信ryzen master...1.6長行先死, D人LN2 超2700X 都用1.75~1.85V, 一時三刻唔會死

搵唔到B450 mortar, B450 Tomahawk 就咁寫

The maximum CPU core voltage the B450 Tomahawk supports is 1.55 V.

msi bios 做乜野俾人set咁高.....
